Refinery Specialist.name: Refinery Specialist
Refinery Specialist.description: You have proficiency in your choice of constructor's implements, scavenging kit, or surveyor's implements. Additionally, whenever you make an Intelligence (Nature) check to identify a metal or mineral, you are considered to have expertise in the Nature skill.

Knowledge Protocol.name: Knowledge Protocol
Knowledge Protocol.description: You have proficiency in the Lore skill.

Quick Learner.name: Quick Learner
Quick Learner.description: When using downtime for learning a new language or training with a set of tools, it takes half the amount of time and credits necessary to complete.

Way of the Warrior.name: Way of the Warrior
Way of the Warrior.description: You have proficiency with light and medium armor as well as vibroblades and vibroswords.

Four-Armed.name: Four-Armed
Four-Armed.description: Xexto have four arms which they can use independently of one another. You can only gain the benefit of items held by two of your arms at any given time, and once per round you can switch which arms you are benefiting from (no action required).

Natural Survivalist.name: Natural Survivalist
Natural Survivalist.description: You have proficiency in Nature and Survival.

Unsettling Visage.name: Unsettling Visage
Unsettling Visage.description: When a creature you can see makes an attack roll against you, you can use your reaction to impose disadvantage on the roll. You must use this feature before knowing whether the attack hits or misses. Using this trait reveals your shapeshifting nature to any creature within 30 feet that can see you. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

Wealthy.name: Wealthy
Wealthy.description: During character creation, you start with additional credits equal to your level x your proficiency bonus x 1,000 cr.

Cold Adaptation.name: Cold Adaptation
Cold Adaptation.description: You have advantage on Constitution saving throws made to avoid exhaustion due to extreme cold.

Born Pilots.name: Born Pilots
Born Pilots.description: Nothoiins demonstrate seemingly innate piloting abilities from a very young age. You have proficiency in the Piloting skill.

Ink Cloud.name: Ink Cloud
Ink Cloud.description: As an action, you can expel ink in a 10-foot cone. When you do so, each creature in the area of the exhalation must make a Constitution saving throw (DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Constitution modifier). On a failed save, a creature is blinded until the end of its next turn. This ability has no effect on constructs. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus. You regain all expended uses when you complete a long rest.

Curiosity.name: Curiosity
Curiosity.description: You have proficiency with Survival or Investigation (your choice).

Subsonic Bellow.name: Subsonic Bellow
Subsonic Bellow.description: As an action, you can violently expel air in a 15-foot cone. When you do so, each creature in the area of the exhalation must make a Wisdom saving throw (DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Constitution modifier). A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] sonic damage on a failed save, and half as much damage on a successful one. The damage increases to [[/r 4d6]] at 5th level, [[/r 6d6]] at 11th level, and [[/r 8d6]] at 17th level. This ability has no effect on constructs. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus. You regain all expended uses when you complete a long rest.

Bo-rifle Training.name: Bo-rifle Training
Bo-rifle Training.description: You have proficiency with blaster rifles, bo-rifles, and vibrostaffs.

Trance.name: Trance
Trance.description: You only need 3 hours of sleep during a long rest to gain its benefits, instead of 6. Additionally, if your long rest would be interrupted, you only need to complete the long rest instead of restarting it to gain its benefits.

Heat Sensitivity.name: Heat Sensitivity
Heat Sensitivity.description: You have disadvantage on Constitution saving throws made to avoid exhaustion due to extreme heat.

Enforcer.name: Enforcer
Enforcer.description: You are proficient in the Intimidation skill. When you take the Help action to give an ally advantage on an Intimidation check, they gain a bonus to the roll equal to your proficiency bonus.

Notorious Slavers.name: Notorious Slavers
Notorious Slavers.description: Whenever you make an ability check related to the buying, selling, or controlling of slaves, you are considered proficient in the check. If you would already be proficient, you instead have expertise.

Flexible Cheeks.name: Flexible Cheeks
Flexible Cheeks.description: Squibs have flexible cheeks in which they can store small goods. You can store up to two items that weigh a combined total of no more than 2 lb. in your cheeks, and you have advantage on Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks made to conceal them.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: You have a flying speed equal to your walking speed. While wearing medium or heavy armor, your flying speed is reduced by half.

Stinger.name: Stinger
Stinger.description: Your stinger is a natural weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. Additionally, your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d4]] kinetic damage.

Sonic Sensitivity.name: Sonic Sensitivity
Sonic Sensitivity.description: Your powerful sense of hearing makes you especially vulnerable to deafening sounds. You have disadvantage on saving throws against effects that would deal sonic damage (explained in chapter 9).

Natural Healer.name: Natural Healer
Natural Healer.description: You have proficiency in the Medicine and Nature skills, and the bioanalysis kit.

Geneticist.name: Geneticist
Geneticist.description: You have proficiency in the Medicine skill.

Programmer.name: Programmer
Programmer.description: Whenever you make an Intelligence (Technology) check related to computers, you are considered to have expertise in the Technology skill.

Regenerative.name: Regenerative
Regenerative.description: When you take damage, you can use your reaction and expend a Hit Die to regain hit points as long as the damage would not reduce your hit points to 0.

Heightened Reflexes.name: Heightened Reflexes
Heightened Reflexes.description: Whenever you make a Dexterity ability check, attack roll, or saving throw, you can choose to add [[/r 1d4]] to the result. You can use this before or after the roll, but before the GM determines the roll's outcome. Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or long rest before you can use it again.

Impose Order.name: Impose Order
Impose Order.description: As a bonus action, you can command each ally within 15 feet of you to move up to half that ally's speed as a reaction. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. Once you use this trait, you can—t use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

Montral Reception.name: Montral Reception
Montral Reception.description: You have tremorsense out to 30 feet. You can detect and pinpoint the origin of vibrations within a specific radius, provided that you and the source of the vibrations are in contact with the same ground or substance. Tremorsense can't be used to detect flying or incorporeal creatures.

Nimble Reflexes.name: Nimble Reflexes
Nimble Reflexes.description: Kiffar are naturally adapted to avoiding the Force. You have advantage on Dexterity and Intelligence saving throws against force powers.

Head Crest.name: Head Crest
Head Crest.description: Your head crest is a natural weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. Additionally, your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d6]] kinetic damage.

Intimidating Roar.name: Intimidating Roar
Intimidating Roar.description: Once per day, you can cast the fear force power. Charisma is your forcecasting ability for this power.

Naturalist.name: Naturalist
Naturalist.description: You have proficiency in the Nature skill.

Umbaran Specilization.name: Umbaran Specilization
Umbaran Specilization.description: You have proficiency in one of the following skills: Insight, Technology, Deception, or Perception.

Gamorrean Toughness.name: Gamorrean Toughness
Gamorrean Toughness.description: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 every time you gain a level. Additionally, you have advantage on Constitution saving throws.

Gank Training.name: Gank Training
Gank Training.description: You have proficiency in light and medium armor as well as two vibroweapons or blasters of your choice.

Voss Weapon Training.name: Voss Weapon Training
Voss Weapon Training.description: You have proficiency with the blaster rifle and techblade.

Watchful.name: Watchful
Watchful.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

Authoritative.name: Authoritative
Authoritative.description: You have proficiency in Persuasion or Intimidation (your choice).

Shrewd.name: Shrewd
Shrewd.description: You are proficient in the Insight and Deception skills.

Cat\u0027s Claws.name: Cat's Claws
Cat\u0027s Claws.description: Your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d6]] kinetic damage and have the finesse property.

Slow Metabolism.name: Slow Metabolism
Slow Metabolism.description: You are able to go a number of days without food equal to 3 + twice your Constitution modifier before suffering exhaustion.

Skill Protocol.name: Skill Protocol
Skill Protocol.description: You have proficiency in two skills of your choice.

Agricultural Exports.name: Agricultural Exports
Agricultural Exports.description: Whenever you make an Intelligence (Nature) or Intelligence (Technology) check related to food, agriculture, or agricultural technology, you are considered to have expertise in the skill.

Racer\u0027s Reflexes.name: Racer's Reflexes
Racer\u0027s Reflexes.description: Whenever you make a Dexterity ability check, attack roll, or saving throw, you can choose to add [[/r 1d4]] to the result. You cannot do so again until you complete a short or long rest.

Defensive Ball.name: Defensive Ball
Defensive Ball.description: You are able to curl into a rolling ball for extra protection. When you take the Dash action while you aren't wielding a shield, you gain a bonus to AC equal to half your proficiency bonus until the start of your next turn.

Acute Smell.name: Acute Smell
Acute Smell.description: Whenever you make a Wisdom (Perception) check involving smell, you are considered to have expertise in the Perception skill.

Changeling Instincts.name: Changeling Instincts
Changeling Instincts.description: You gain proficiency with two of the following skills of your choice: Deception, Intimidation, Insight, or Persuasion.

Prediction.name: Prediction
Prediction.description: You can embrace the Force and use your advanced insight to predict likely outcomes, allowing you to turn failures into successes. When you roll a 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

Starship Specialists.name: Starship Specialists
Starship Specialists.description: Whenever you make an Intelligence (Technology) check related to starships, you are considered to have expertise in the Technology skill.

Cold Sensitivity.name: Cold Sensitivity
Cold Sensitivity.description: You have disadvantage on Constitution saving throws made to avoid exhaustion due to extreme cold.

Weapon Developers.name: Weapon Developers
Weapon Developers.description: Baragwin are famous throughout the galaxy for their quality arms manufacturing. You have proficiency with armstech's implements, munitions kits, or two weapons of your choice.

Gamorrean Weaponry.name: Gamorrean Weaponry
Gamorrean Weaponry.description: You have proficiency with the vibroaxe, vibromace, and vibrosword.

Keen Smell.name: Keen Smell
Keen Smell.description: You have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

Stalking Hunter.name: Stalking Hunter
Stalking Hunter.description: You have proficiency in the Survival and Stealth skills.

Leonine Agility.name: Leonine Agility
Leonine Agility.description: Your reflexes and agility allow you to move with a burst of speed. When you move on your turn in combat, you can double your speed until the end of the turn. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you move 0 feet on one of your turns.

Cannibalize.name: Cannibalize
Cannibalize.description: If you spend at least 1 minute devouring the corpse of a beast or humanoid, you gain temporary hit points equal to your Constitution modifier. Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or long rest before you can use it again.

Memnii Transfer.name: Memnii Transfer
Memnii Transfer.description: As an action, while touching a creature, you can initiate a memnii transfer. The creature must make an Intelligence saving throw (DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Intelligence modifier), a creature can choose to fail this saving throw if it wishes. On a failed save the target is stunned, and you can share vivid memories with the target as if they were their own for 1 minute or until your concentration ends (as if you were concentrating on a power). The transfer ends if you stop touching the target. At the end of each of its turns, the creature can repeat the saving throw to resist the transfer. On a success, the transfer ends. Otherwise, you may end the transfer on your turn (no action required). Once you've used this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a long rest. This feature has no effect on droids, constructs, or Force-Insensitive creatures.

Thieving.name: Thieving
Thieving.description: You have proficiency in the Sleight of Hand skill.

Arm Blades.name: Arm Blades
Arm Blades.description: Your retractable dewclaws are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. Additionally, your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d6]] kinetic damage.

Silver Tongue.name: Silver Tongue
Silver Tongue.description: You have proficiency with Deception or Persuasion (your choice).

Mechanical Memory.name: Mechanical Memory
Mechanical Memory.description: Whenever you make an Intelligence (Technology) check related to memorizing or duplicating mechanical readouts, you are considered to have expertise in the Technology skill.

Size.name: Size
Size.description: Zygerrians normally stand between 5 to 6 feet tall and weigh about 140 lbs. Regardless of your position in that range, your size is Medium.

Predatory Talents.name: Predatory Talents
Predatory Talents.description: You have proficiency in one of the following skills: Acrobatics, Sleight of Hand, Stealth, or Technology.

Enthralling Hypnosis.name: Enthralling Hypnosis
Enthralling Hypnosis.description: You can use your psychic aura to influence individuals of both sexes. Whenever you roll a 1 on a Charisma (Persuasion) check, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll. Additionally, once per short or long rest, you can treat a [[/r d20]] roll of 9 or lower on a Charisma check as a 10. This feature has no effect on droids or constructs.

Jungle Dweller.name: Jungle Dweller
Jungle Dweller.description: Growing up in the rainforests of Troiken has left an impact. You don—t treat jungle terrain as difficult terrain.

Luminescent Aura.name: Luminescent Aura
Luminescent Aura.description: Starting at 3rd level, you can use your action to amplify your radiant aura, causing a searing light to radiate from you. Your transformation lasts for 1 minute or until you end it as a bonus action. During it, you shed bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet, and at the end of each of your turns, you and each creature within 10 feet of you take psychic damage equal to half your level (rounded up). In addition, once on each of your turns, you can deal extra psychic damage to one target when you deal damage to it with an attack or a power. The extra psychic damage equals your level.

Keen Senses.name: Keen Senses
Keen Senses.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

Vigilant.name: Vigilant
Vigilant.description: You can choose to have advantage on your next Initiative check. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

Hypersensitive Hearing.name: Hypersensitive Hearing
Hypersensitive Hearing.description: Pau'ans possess incredibly receptive hearing, often to their detriment, so you wear special covers on your ears. Whenever you make a Wisdom (Perception) check involving hearing, you are considered to have expertise in the Perception skill, but if your hearing aids are removed, you have disadvantage on saving throws against effects that would deal sonic damage.

Mercenary Specialization.name: Mercenary Specialization
Mercenary Specialization.description: You have proficiency in one of the following skills: Intimidation, Persuasion, Stealth, or Perception.

Puny.name: Puny
Puny.description: Zilkin are too small to pack much of a punch. You have disadvantage on Strength saving throws, and when determining your bonus to attack and damage rolls for weapon attacks using Strength, you can't add more than +3.

Life in the Void.name: Life in the Void
Life in the Void.description: You have resistance to necrotic damage, and while exposed to the vacuum of space, you can survive for a number of hours equal to your Constitution modifier (minimum 1 hour), instead of a number of rounds.

Two Brains.name: Two Brains
Two Brains.description: When you make a Wisdom saving throw, you can use your reaction to gain advantage on the roll. Once you've done so, you must complete a short or long rest before you can do so again.

Mon Calamari Resistance.name: Mon Calamari Resistance
Mon Calamari Resistance.description: You have advantage on saving throws against effects that grant the slowed condition and you have resistance against cold damage (explained in chapter 9).

Sa\u0027tosin Sense.name: Sa'tosin Sense
Sa\u0027tosin Sense.description: Tarasins have short spines called sa'tosin that allow them to sense the use of the Force. You are constantly under the effects of the force power sense force, though the power does not require concentration for you.

Enthralling Pheromones.name: Enthralling Pheromones
Enthralling Pheromones.description: You can use your pheromones to influence individuals of both sexes. Whenever you roll a 1 on a Charisma (Persuasion) check, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll. Additionally, once per short or long rest, you can treat a [[/r d20]] roll of 9 or lower on a Charisma check as a 10. This feature has no effect on droids or constructs.

Surgical Strikes.name: Surgical Strikes
Surgical Strikes.description: Your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d4]] kinetic damage. Additionally, as a bonus action, you can perform a special pressure point attack. On a hit, the target suffers the attack—s normal effects, and it must make a Constitution saving throw (DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Constitution modifier). On a failed save, the target is stunned until the end of its next turn, and you can—t use this feature again until you complete a short or long rest.

Treeclimber.name: Treeclimber
Treeclimber.description: You have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed. You have advantage on Strength ability checks and saving throws that involve climbing.

Stealthy.name: Stealthy
Stealthy.description: You are proficient in the Stealth skill.

Droid Vulnerabilities.name: Droid Vulnerabilities
Droid Vulnerabilities.description: You are vulnerable to ion damage. Additionally, you have disadvantage on saving throws against effects that would deal ion or lightning damage.

Superior Memory.name: Superior Memory
Superior Memory.description: You can double your proficiency bonus for it when you make an Intelligence (Lore) check to recall information you have learned, or to recall the details of your experiences.

Hooves and Horns.name: Hooves and Horns
Hooves and Horns.description: Your hooves (and depending on your age, horns) are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. Additionally, your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d6]] kinetic damage.

Sonic Scream.name: Sonic Scream
Sonic Scream.description: As an action, you can violently expel air in a 15-foot cone. When you do so, each creature in the area of the exhalation must make a Wisdom saving throw (DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Constitution modifier). A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] sonic damage on a failed save, and half as much damage on a successful one. The damage increases to [[/r 4d6]] at 5th level, [[/r 6d6]] at 11th level, and [[/r 8d6]] at 17th level. This ability has no effect on constructs. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus. You regain all expended uses when you complete a long rest.

Elegant Dancers.name: Elegant Dancers
Elegant Dancers.description: You have proficiency in the Performance skill.

Lungless.name: Lungless
Lungless.description: Gand do not have lungs, and therefore do not need to breathe.

Six-Armed.name: Six-Armed
Six-Armed.description: Harch have six arms which they can use independently of one another. You can only gain the benefit of items held by two of your arms at any given time, and once per round you can switch which arms you are benefiting from (no action required).

Ability Score Increase.name: Ability Score Increase
Ability Score Increase.description: Your Charisma score increases by 2, and your Intelligence score increases by 1.

Technician.name: Technician
Technician.description: You are proficient in the Technology skill.

Coercive.name: Coercive
Coercive.description: You have proficiency with Persuasion or Intimidation (your choice).

Fearless.name: Fearless
Fearless.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

Claws.name: Claws
Claws.description: Your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d4]] kinetic damage and have the finesse property.

Law of Life.name: Law of Life
Law of Life.description: Ithorians have a sacred respect for the natural world, taking great care to preserve and study it. You have proficiency in the Nature skill and the bioanalysis kit.

Human Versatility.name: Human Versatility
Human Versatility.description: You gain proficiency in one skill, one tool, and one weapon of your choice.

Energy Sensors.name: Energy Sensors
Energy Sensors.description: Gotals perceive the environment around them through use of electromagnetic sensors held in their cranial horns. You have blindsight out to 30 feet. If another trait would grant you blindsight, the range is increased by half as many feet.

Tanned.name: Tanned
Tanned.description: You have tough, leathery skin. While you are unarmored or wearing light armor, your AC is 13 + your Dexterity modifier. Additionally, You have advantage on Constitution saving throws made to avoid exhaustion due to extreme heat.

Keen Sight.name: Keen Sight
Keen Sight.description: Through use of infrared vision, you have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

Spider Climb.name: Spider Climb
Spider Climb.description: You have a climbing speed of 30 feet. You have advantage on Strength saving throws and Strength (Athletics) checks that involve climbing, and while climbing you always have two hands free.

Organized.name: Organized
Organized.description: Your society values organization, and as such you are good at making good use of the space provided. When you are in charge of packing a space, such as a vehicle or cargo hold, that space's carrying capacity is increased by one-fourth its base capacity.

Easily Addicted.name: Easily Addicted
Easily Addicted.description: Arcona are susceptible to spice addiction, and as a result you are taught to identify it from an early age. Additionally, consuming salt can cause them to hallucinate, potentially replicating the effects of spice. Whenever you make an ability check related to identifying salt or spice or seeing whether something contains salt or spice, you have advantage.

Allies of the Force.name: Allies of the Force
Allies of the Force.description: Whenever you make a Wisdom (Insight) check against someone you know to wield the Force, you are considered to have expertise in the Insight skill.

Force-Sensitive.name: Force-Sensitive
Force-Sensitive.description: You know the denounce at-will force power. When you reach 3rd level, you learn and can cast the curse force power once per long rest. When you reach 5th level, you learn and can cast the bestow curse force power once per long rest. Your forcecasting ability is Charisma for these powers.

Tail and Claw.name: Tail and Claw
Tail and Claw.description: Your strong tail and razor-sharp claws are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. Additionally, your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d6]] kinetic damage.

Natural Armor.name: Natural Armor
Natural Armor.description: Due to your carapace and the shape of your body, you are ill-suited to wearing armor. Your carapace provides ample protection, however; it gives you a base AC of 17 (your Dexterity modifier doesn't affect this number). You gain no benefit from wearing armor, but if you are using a shield, you can apply the shield's bonus as normal.

Savage Attacks.name: Savage Attacks
Savage Attacks.description: When you score a critical hit with a melee weapon attack, you can roll one of the weapon's damage dice one additional time and add it to the extra damage of the critical hit.

Smooth Talker.name: Smooth Talker
Smooth Talker.description: You have proficiency in Deception and Persuasion.

Iron Will.name: Iron Will
Iron Will.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed.

Integrated Engineering.name: Integrated Engineering
Integrated Engineering.description: You have proficiency in one specialist's kit of your choice. The chosen kit is integrated into your chassis, and can not be removed while you are conscious.

Exoskeleton.name: Exoskeleton
Exoskeleton.description: You have a thick exoskeleton. While you are unarmored or wearing light armor, your AC is 13 + your Dexterity modifier.

Vocalizer.name: Vocalizer
Vocalizer.description: Tognath vocal cords are not made for oxygen rich environments, and rely on a vocalizer to communicate effectively with other species. If your vocalizer is removed or destroyed, your voice becomes quiet and difficult to understand.

Geonosian Weaponry.name: Geonosian Weaponry
Geonosian Weaponry.description: You have proficiency in blasters that deal sonic damage.

Small and Nimble.name: Small and Nimble
Small and Nimble.description: You are too small and fast to effectively target. You have a +1 bonus to AC, and you have advantage on Dexterity saving throws.

Equine Build.name: Equine Build
Equine Build.description: Your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift doubles. If it would already double, it instead triples. Additionally, any climb that requires hands and feet is especially difficult for you because of your hooves. When you make such a climb, each foot of movement costs you 4 extra feet, instead of the normal 1 extra foot. Finally, a Medium or smaller creature can ride on your equine back if you allow it. In such a situation, you continue to act independently, not as a controlled mount.

Dexterous.name: Dexterous
Dexterous.description: You have proficiency in one of the following skills: Acrobatics, Piloting, or Sleight of Hand.

Inquisitive.name: Inquisitive
Inquisitive.description: You have proficiency in the Investigation skill.

Nimbleness.name: Nimbleness
Nimbleness.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.

Vacuum Sealed.name: Vacuum Sealed
Vacuum Sealed.description: You can survive for one day within the vacuum of space. You still require oxygen to breathe. You have resistance to cold damage.

Mask of the Wild.name: Mask of the Wild
Mask of the Wild.description: You can attempt to hide even when you are only lightly obscured by foliage, heavy rain, falling snow, mist, and other natural phenomena.

Force-Insensitive.name: Force-Insensitive
Force-Insensitive.description: While Ssi-ruuk can be manipulated by many force powers, they can not sense the Force. You can not use force powers or take levels in forcecasting classes.

Sneaky.name: Sneaky
Sneaky.description: You are proficient in the Stealth skill.

Sunlight Sensitivity.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
Sunlight Sensitivity.description: You have disadvantage on attack rolls and on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight when you, the target of your attack, or whatever you are trying to perceive is in direct sunlight.

Rolling Agility.name: Rolling Agility
Rolling Agility.description: As a lurmen, you can run on all fours, or curl into a ball, to move quickly along the ground. When you move on your turn in combat, you can double your speed until the end of the turn. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you move 0 feet on one of your turns.

Inscrutable.name: Inscrutable
Inscrutable.description: Your calm demeanor and control make you hard to read. Wisdom (Insight) checks made against you have disadvantage, and you have advantage on any saving throw against an effect that would read your thoughts.

Darkvision.name: Darkvision
Darkvision.description: You have a cat's keen senses, especially in the dark. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

Relentless Endurance.name: Relentless Endurance
Relentless Endurance.description: When you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead. You can't use this feature again until you finish a long rest.

Prehensile Tail and Feet.name: Prehensile Tail and Feet
Prehensile Tail and Feet.description: You have supreme control over your tail and feet and can use them to manipulate objects as well as your hands.

Natural Grappler.name: Natural Grappler
Natural Grappler.description: Whenever you make a Strength (Athletics) check to grapple you are considered to have expertise in the Athletics skill.

Fisticuffs.name: Fisticuffs
Fisticuffs.description: Your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d4]] kinetic damage and have the finesse property.

Crafters.name: Crafters
Crafters.description: You have proficiency with one set of artisan's implements of your choice.

Arms Dealers.name: Arms Dealers
Arms Dealers.description: Whenever you make a Charisma (Persuasion) check related to buying or selling weapons, you are considered to have expertise in the Persuasion skill.

Keen Hearing and Smell.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
Keen Hearing and Smell.description: You have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that involve hearing or smell.

Scholarly.name: Scholarly
Scholarly.description: You have proficiency in the Insight skill.

Snap Senses.name: Snap Senses
Snap Senses.description: Through your antenna, you can sense incoming danger and react accordingly. When you roll for initiative, you can choose to gain advantage on the roll. Alternatively, if you are surprised, you may act normally on your first turn. Once you've used this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

Divination.name: Divination
Divination.description: Whether through mystical divination or sheer luck, you can turn failures into successes. When you roll a 1 on the [[/r d20]] for an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

Business Savvy.name: Business Savvy
Business Savvy.description: A common trait of all Toydarians is their shrewd business sense and their ability to haggle any deal. A loyal and proud people, these traits could be off-putting to outsiders, as many Toydarians in the galaxy were seen as crooks or slimy businessmen, but this was not always the case. Whenever you make a Charisma (Persuasion) check involving haggling you are considered to have expertise in the Persuasion skill.

Gift of the Progenitor.name: Gift of the Progenitor
Gift of the Progenitor.description: You know the temporary boost at-will tech power. When you reach 3rd level, you learn and can cast the kolto pack tech power once per day. When you reach 5th level, you learn and can cast the kolto cloud tech power once per day. Your techcasting ability is Intelligence. You do not require use of a wristpad for these powers.

Insightful.name: Insightful
Insightful.description: Nautolan head tentacles are adept at determining moods. You have advantage on Wisdom (Insight) checks to determine emotions.

Torpor.name: Torpor
Torpor.description: You only need 3 hours of sleep during a long rest to gain its benefits, instead of 6. Additionally, if your long rest would be interrupted, you only need to complete the long rest instead of restarting it to gain its benefits.

Tusken Weaponry.name: Tusken Weaponry
Tusken Weaponry.description: You have proficiency with the cycler rifle and vibroaxe.

Prehensile Tail.name: Prehensile Tail
Prehensile Tail.description: You have supreme control over your tail and can use it to manipulate objects as well as your hands.

Hold Breath.name: Hold Breath
Hold Breath.description: You can hold your breath for up to 15 minutes at a time.

Maintenance Mode.name: Maintenance Mode
Maintenance Mode.description: Rather than sleep, you must spend 3 hours performing routine maintenance during a long rest to gain its benefits, during which you have disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks. Additionally, if your long rest would be interrupted, you only need to complete the long rest instead of restarting it.

Negotiators.name: Negotiators
Negotiators.description: You have advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks meant to negotiate terms or agreements between parties.

Slicer.name: Slicer
Slicer.description: You have proficiency with the Technology skill and the slicer's kit.

Protective Membrane.name: Protective Membrane
Protective Membrane.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being blinded.

Political Guile.name: Political Guile
Political Guile.description: You are proficient in Persuasion or Deception (your choice).

Echani Art.name: Echani Art
Echani Art.description: If a humanoid you can see makes a melee weapon attack, you can use your reaction to make a Wisdom (Insight) check against the target's Charisma (Deception). On a success you learn one of the following traits about that creature: it's Strength, Dexterity or Constitution score; bonus to Strength, Dexterity or Constitution saving throws; armor class; or current hit points. On a failure, the target becomes immune to this feature for one day. You can use this ability a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (a minimum of once). You regain all expended uses on a long rest.

Force Sight.name: Force Sight
Force Sight.description: Miraluka perceive the environment around them through use of the Force. You are constantly under the effects of the force power force sight, though the power does not require concentration for you.

Animal Handler.name: Animal Handler
Animal Handler.description: You have proficiency in the Animal Handling skill.

Combative Culture.name: Combative Culture
Combative Culture.description: You have proficiency in Lore and Acrobatics.

Shadow People.name: Shadow People
Shadow People.description: You can attempt to hide even when you are only lightly obscured by dim light.

Natural Resilience.name: Natural Resilience
Natural Resilience.description: You have resistance to poison damage, and you have advantage on saving throws against poison.

Radiation Resistant.name: Radiation Resistant
Radiation Resistant.description: The dying star nearby their homeworld makes nikto naturally used to radiation. You have resistance to necrotic damage.

Powerful Charge.name: Powerful Charge
Powerful Charge.description: If you move at least 10 feet in a straight line before hitting with a melee weapon attack, you can attempt to trip the target prone as part of the same attack. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

Major Miners.name: Major Miners
Major Miners.description: Nothoiins have intimate knowledge of ur-diamond mining and refinement practices. You gain proficiency in your choice of jeweler's implements, scavenging kit, or archaeologist kit.

Swim.name: Swim
Swim.description: You have a swimming speed of 20 feet.

Intuitive Initiative.name: Intuitive Initiative
Intuitive Initiative.description: You can choose to reroll Initiative checks, but you must use the new roll.

Anatomical Knowledge.name: Anatomical Knowledge
Anatomical Knowledge.description: You have proficiency in the Medicine skill.

Menacing.name: Menacing
Menacing.description: You have proficiency in the Intimidation skill.

Galactic Traveler.name: Galactic Traveler
Galactic Traveler.description: You have proficiency in the Lore skill.

Fury of the Small.name: Fury of the Small
Fury of the Small.description: When you damage a creature with an attack or a power and the creature's size is larger than yours, you can cause the attack or power to deal extra damage to the creature. The extra damage equals your level. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

Politically Minded.name: Politically Minded
Politically Minded.description: You have proficiency in the Insight skill.

Hidden Step.name: Hidden Step
Hidden Step.description: As a bonus action, you can turn invisible until the start of your next turn or until you attack, make a damage roll, or force someone to make a saving throw. Once you've used this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

Stargazer.name: Stargazer
Stargazer.description: You have proficiency in Piloting and Technology.

Split Mind.name: Split Mind
Split Mind.description: When you make a Wisdom saving throw, you can use your reaction to gain advantage on the roll. Once you've done so, you must complete a short or long rest before you can do so again.

Climb.name: Climb
Climb.description: You have a climbing speed of 35 feet.

Detail Oriented.name: Detail Oriented
Detail Oriented.description: You are practiced at scouring for details. You have advantage on Intelligence (Investigation) checks within 5 feet.

Hardened Carapace.name: Hardened Carapace
Hardened Carapace.description: While you are unarmored or wearing light armor, your AC is 13 + your Dexterity modifier.

Art Obsession.name: Art Obsession
Art Obsession.description: Whenever you make an ability check related to the acquisition or location of art or valuables, you are considered proficient in the check. If you would already be proficient, you instead have expertise.

Bite.name: Bite
Bite.description: Your tusks are a natural weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. Additionally, your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d6]] kinetic damage.

Kiffar Heritage.name: Kiffar Heritage
Kiffar Heritage.description: A small percentage of the kiffar population are naturally Force-sensitive, able to read the memories contained within inanimate objects, while others train to become proud guardians of their home sector. You choose one of the following heritages:

Keen Hearing and Sight.name: Keen Hearing and Sight
Keen Hearing and Sight.description: You have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or sight.

Wild Hunters.name: Wild Hunters
Wild Hunters.description: You have proficiency in the Survival skill.

Heat Adaptation.name: Heat Adaptation
Heat Adaptation.description: You have advantage on Constitution saving throws made to avoid exhaustion due to extreme heat.

Compound Eyes.name: Compound Eyes
Compound Eyes.description: Whenever you make a Wisdom (Perception) check related to sight, you are considered to have expertise in the Perception skill.

Stealthy Hunter.name: Stealthy Hunter
Stealthy Hunter.description: You have proficiency in the Survival and Stealth skills.

Oversized.name: Oversized
Oversized.description: Lightweapons and vibroweapons that lack the dexterity or light property are considered to have the heavy property for you. The strength number for blasters is reduced by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If the strength number is 11, you ignore it entirely.

Reader of Hearts.name: Reader of Hearts
Reader of Hearts.description: Through identifying subtle variations in a target's body heat, the Gran are able to better understand their emotions and intentions. You are proficient in the Insight skill.

Tooth and Nail.name: Tooth and Nail
Tooth and Nail.description: Your sharp teeth and claws are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. Additionally, your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d6]] kinetic damage. Lastly, as a bonus action, you can perform a special bite attack. On a hit, the target suffers the attack's normal effects, you gain temporary hit points equal to your Constitution modifier (minimum of 1), and you can't use this trait again until you finish a short or long rest.

Powerful Leap.name: Powerful Leap
Powerful Leap.description: If you jump at least 10 feet in a straight line before hitting with a melee weapon attack, you can attempt to trip the target prone as part of the same attack. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

Unarmed Combatant.name: Unarmed Combatant
Unarmed Combatant.description: Your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d4]] kinetic damage and have the finesse property.

Acute Senses.name: Acute Senses
Acute Senses.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

Tracker.name: Tracker
Tracker.description: You have proficiency in the Survival skill. Additionally, you are considered to have expertise in Wisdom (Survival) checks made to track a creature if that creature has a scent.

Closed Mind.name: Closed Mind
Closed Mind.description: Toydarian brains have an unusual composition which made them resistant to influence from the Force. You have advantage on Wisdom and Charisma saving throws against force powers.

Mutation.name: Mutation
Mutation.description: Theelin gain unique mutations, a result of cross-breeding with other humanoids. Choose one of the following mutations.

Shapechanger.name: Shapechanger
Shapechanger.description: As an action, you can change your appearance and your voice. You determine the specifics of the changes, including your coloration, hair length, and sex. You can also adjust your height and weight, but not so much that your size changes. You can make yourself appear as a member of another species, though none of your game statistics change. You can't duplicate the appearance of a creature you've never seen, and you must adopt a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs that you have. Your clothing and equipment aren't changed by this trait. You stay in the new form until you use an action to revert to your true form or until you die.

Precognition.name: Precognition
Precognition.description: You see brief visions of the future, that allow you to turn failures into successes. When you roll a 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

Age.name: Age
Age.description: Zygerrians reach adulthood in their late teens and live less than a century.

Aggressive.name: Aggressive
Aggressive.description: As a bonus action, you can move up to your speed toward an enemy of your choice that you can see or hear. You must end this move closer to the enemy than you started.

Adept Climbers.name: Adept Climbers
Adept Climbers.description: You have a climbing speed of 30 feet.

Nimble Agility.name: Nimble Agility
Nimble Agility.description: Your reflexes and agility allow you to move with a burst of speed. When you move on your turn in combat, you can double your speed until the end of the tum. Once you use this trait, you can—t use it again until you move 0 feet on one of your turns.

Con Artist.name: Con Artist
Con Artist.description: You have proficiency in one gaming set of your choice.

Alignment.name: Alignment
Alignment.description: Zygerrian culture's emphasis on subjugation and strength causes them to tend towards chaotic dark side, though there are exceptions.

Tinker.name: Tinker
Tinker.description: You have proficiency with tinker's implements. You can use these and spend 1 hour and 100 cr worth of materials to construct a Tiny Device (AC 5, 1 hp). You can take the Use an Object action to have your device cause one of the following effects: create a small explosion, create a repeating loud noise for 1 minute, create smoke for 1 minute, cause harmless tremors for 1 minute. You can maintain a number of these devices up to your proficiency bonus at once, and a device stops functioning after 24 hours away from you. You can dismantle the device to reclaim the materials used to create it.

Skill Versatility.name: Skill Versatility
Skill Versatility.description: You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.

Natural Resistance.name: Natural Resistance
Natural Resistance.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage (explained in chapter 9).

Musical.name: Musical
Musical.description: You have proficiency in Performance and one musical instrument of your choice.

Armored Plates.name: Armored Plates
Armored Plates.description: You have thick armored plates. While you are unarmored or wearing light armor, your AC is 13 + your Dexterity modifier.

Flexible.name: Flexible
Flexible.description: You have advantage on Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks that involve flexibility.

Rain Forest Dweller.name: Rain Forest Dweller
Rain Forest Dweller.description: Growing up in the rain forests of Moltok has left an impact. You don't treat forest terrain as difficult terrain.

Arkanian Brilliance.name: Arkanian Brilliance
Arkanian Brilliance.description: Whenever you make an ability check, attack roll, or saving throw using Intelligence, you can choose to add [[/r 1d4]] to the result. You can choose to do this after the check is rolled, but before the DM determines if you've passed or failed the check. You cannot do so again until you complete a short or long rest.

Superior Darkvision.name: Superior Darkvision
Superior Darkvision.description: You've lived most of your life without direct sunlight. You can see in dim light within 120 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

Armor Integration.name: Armor Integration
Armor Integration.description: You can not wear armor, but you can have the armor professionally integrated into your chassis over the course of a long rest. This work must be done by someone proficient with astrotech's implements. You must be proficient in armor in order to have it integrated.

Natural Antitoxins.name: Natural Antitoxins
Natural Antitoxins.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison and disease, and you have resistance against poison damage (explained in Chapter 9).

Reptilian Senses.name: Reptilian Senses
Reptilian Senses.description: Whenever you make a Wisdom (Perception) check related to sensing heat, you are considered to have expertise in the Perception skill.

Three Hearts.name: Three Hearts
Three Hearts.description: When you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead. You can't use this feature again until you finish a long rest.

Force Contention.name: Force Contention
Force Contention.description: Due to their unique physiology, flesh raider hardiness allows them to overcome use of the Force. You have advantage on Strength and Constitution saving throws against force powers.

Telepathy.name: Telepathy
Telepathy.description: You can communicate telepathically with creatures within 30 feet of you. You must share a language with the target in order to communicate in this way.

Celestial Physiology.name: Celestial Physiology
Celestial Physiology.description: You can survive for one day within the vacuum of space.

Tympanic Antennae.name: Tympanic Antennae
Tympanic Antennae.description: You have tremorsense out to 30 feet. You can detect and pinpoint the origin of vibrations within that radius, provided that monster and the source of the vibrations are in contact with the same ground or substance. Tremorsense can't be used to detect flying or incorporeal creatures

Primitive Nerves.name: Primitive Nerves
Primitive Nerves.description: Because of their primitive nervous systems, tognath are immune to most pain, letting them shrug off major injuries. When you take damage, you can use your reaction to roll a [[/r d12]]. Add your Constitution modifier to the number rolled, and reduce the damage by that total. Once you've used this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

Heat Dissipation.name: Heat Dissipation
Heat Dissipation.description: Whenever you make a Dexterity (Stealth) check to avoid detection by electronic sensors and cameras, you are considered to have expertise in the Stealth skill.

Droid Resistances.name: Droid Resistances
Droid Resistances.description: You are resistant to necrotic, poison, and psychic damage, and are immune to poison and disease.

Tech Resistance.name: Tech Resistance
Tech Resistance.description: Growing up around technology leaves an impact on duros. You have advantage on Dexterity and Intelligence saving throws against tech powers.

Strong and Small.name: Strong and Small
Strong and Small.description: You have a climbing speed of 25 feet.

Rugged Survivalist.name: Rugged Survivalist
Rugged Survivalist.description: You are proficient in the Survival skill. Additionally, you are naturally adapted to hot climates, as described in chapter 5 of the Dungeon Master's Guide.

Charismatic.name: Charismatic
Charismatic.description: You have proficiency with Deception or Persuasion (your choice).

Type.name: Type
Type.description: Your creature type is both beast and humanoid.

Hide.name: Hide
Hide.description: You have a thick hide. While you are unarmored or wearing light armor, your AC is 13 + your Dexterity modifier. Additionally, you have advantage on Constitution saving throws made to avoid exhaustion due to extreme cold.

Spiritual.name: Spiritual
Spiritual.description: You have proficiency in Lore. Additionally, you are considered to have expertise in Intelligence (Lore) checks made to learn or recall something about a culture's religion.

Wisdom of the Elders.name: Wisdom of the Elders
Wisdom of the Elders.description: You are proficient in the Lore skill.

Foragers.name: Foragers
Foragers.description: Whenever you make a Wisdom (Survival) check to forage for food you are considered to have expertise in the Survival skill.

Thick Skin.name: Thick Skin
Thick Skin.description: You have tough, scaly skin and prefer not to wear clothes. While you are unarmored or wearing light armor, your AC is 13 + your Dexterity modifier.

Rapidly Regenerative.name: Rapidly Regenerative
Rapidly Regenerative.description: You heal quickly, both at will and in response to danger. As a bonus action, you can choose to spend one of your Hit Dice to recover hit points. Additionally, when you take damage, you can use your reaction and expend a Hit Die to regain hit points as long as the damage would not reduce your hit points to 0.

Defiant.name: Defiant
Defiant.description: Humans are known to be stubborn and often refuse to give up, even against the worst odds. When you or a creature you can see that can see and understand you makes an ability check, attack roll, or saving throw, you can roll a [[/r d4]] and add it to their roll (no action required). Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or long rest before you can use it again.

Conniving.name: Conniving
Conniving.description: You have proficiency in Deception or Stealth (your choice).

Rapid Reconstruction.name: Rapid Reconstruction
Rapid Reconstruction.description: You are built with internal repair mechanisms. As a bonus action, you can choose to spend one of your Hit Dice to recover hit points.

Technological Affinity.name: Technological Affinity
Technological Affinity.description: You have proficiency in the Technology skill, one vibroweapon and one blaster of your choice, and your choice of armstech's implements, biotech's implements, constructor's implements, mechanic's kits, or tinker's implements. Additionally, you have advantage on Intelligence (Technology) checks made to understand, utilize, or modify technology that you are unaware of or have never seen before.

Foreign Biology.name: Foreign Biology
Foreign Biology.description: You cannot breathe oxygen. The tognath have created a breathing apparatus to negate the negative effects of living in an oxygen rich environment, but if your mask is removed while you are in such an environment, you lose consciousness.

Mercantile.name: Mercantile
Mercantile.description: Whenever you make a Charisma (Persuasion) check related to conducting business, you are considered to have expertise in the Persuasion skill.

Crude Weapon Specialists.name: Crude Weapon Specialists
Crude Weapon Specialists.description: Ewoks are used to making do with less. You can spend 1 hour, which you can do over the course of a short rest, crafting a weapon out of loose materials. You can craft any simple kinetic weapon, but the weapon's damage suffers a -1 penalty.

Horn.name: Horn
Horn.description: Your sharp horn is a natural weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. Additionally, your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d4]] kinetic damage.

Chameleon Skin.name: Chameleon Skin
Chameleon Skin.description: Your scales are translucent, allowing your color-shifting skin to help you blend into your surroundings. You have proficiency in the Stealth skill. Additionally, you can attempt to hide even when you are only lightly obscured by foliage, heavy rain, falling snow, mist, and other natural phenomena.

Mimicry.name: Mimicry
Mimicry.description: You can mimic sounds you have heard, including voices. A creature that hears the sounds you make can tell they are imitations with a successful Wisdom (Insight) check opposed by your Charisma (Deception) check.

Toxin Resistance.name: Toxin Resistance
Toxin Resistance.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage (explained in chapter 9).

Musical Culture.name: Musical Culture
Musical Culture.description: Ewoks incorporate music in their celebrations and rituals. You have proficiency in an instrument of your choice.

Silent Step.name: Silent Step
Silent Step.description: You have proficiency in the Stealth skill.

Reputation for Cruelty.name: Reputation for Cruelty
Reputation for Cruelty.description: You are proficient in Intimidation, as well as the saberwhip and vibrowhip.

Bureaucratic.name: Bureaucratic
Bureaucratic.description: You have proficiency with Persuasion or Intimidation (your choice).

Athletic.name: Athletic
Athletic.description: You have proficiency in the Athletics skill.

Deft Hand.name: Deft Hand
Deft Hand.description: You have proficiency in one of the following skills: Deception, Sleight of Hand, or Stealth.

Horns.name: Horns
Horns.description: Your horns are a natural weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. Additionally, your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d6]] kinetic damage.

Tech-Impaired.name: Tech-Impaired
Tech-Impaired.description: While tuskens can figure out basic technology, they experience difficulty using more complex equipment like wristpads. You can not use tech powers or take levels in techcasting classes.

Crafter.name: Crafter
Crafter.description: Geonosian culture promotes artisanry. You have proficiency in one set of artisan's implements of your choice.

Charming.name: Charming
Charming.description: You have proficiency in Deception or Persuasion.

Gand Resilience.name: Gand Resilience
Gand Resilience.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage (explained in chapter 9).

Sensitive Fur.name: Sensitive Fur
Sensitive Fur.description: Squibs' fur is exceptionally sensitive to physical details. You have advantage on Intelligence (Investigation) checks that rely on touch.

Proficiency.name: Proficiency
Proficiency.description: You gain proficiency in one skill, one tool, and one weapon of your choice.

Prehensile Feet.name: Prehensile Feet
Prehensile Feet.description: You have supreme control over your feet and can use them to manipulate objects as well as your hands.

Expressive.name: Expressive
Expressive.description: You have proficiency in your choice of artist's implements, disguise kits, synthweaver's implements, or one musical instrument of your choice.

Hardened Exterior.name: Hardened Exterior
Hardened Exterior.description: You have a tough, bony exterior. While you are unarmored or wearing light armor, your AC is 13 + your Dexterity modifier.

Surprise Attack.name: Surprise Attack
Surprise Attack.description: If you surprise a creature and hit it with an attack on your first turn in combat, the attack deals an extra [[/r 2d6]] damage to it. You can use this trait only once per combat.

Martial Upbringing.name: Martial Upbringing
Martial Upbringing.description: You have proficiency in light armor, and gain proficiency with two martial vibroweapons of your choice.

Sadistic.name: Sadistic
Sadistic.description: You have proficiency with saberwhips, vibrowhips, and nets.

Amorphous Form.name: Amorphous Form
Amorphous Form.description: You can squeeze through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide, provided you are wearing and carrying nothing. You also have advantage on ability checks you make to initiate or escape a grapple.

Desert Protection.name: Desert Protection
Desert Protection.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being blinded.

Adaptation.name: Adaptation
Adaptation.description: The frequent radiation bursts from the nearby dying star caused the nikto to mutate and adapt into different subspecies over time, specialized for different environments. Choose one of the following adaptations:

Forced March.name: Forced March
Forced March.description: Shistavanen are able to maintain a fast pace longer than other species. Shistavanen have advantage on Constitution saving throws made to avoid Exhaustion due to prolongued travel, as described in Chapter 8.

Cat\u0027s Talent.name: Cat's Talent
Cat\u0027s Talent.description: You have proficiency in the Perception and Stealth skills.

Martial Proficiency.name: Martial Proficiency
Martial Proficiency.description: You have proficiency with light and medium armor as well as the techstaff and vibropike.

Electrical Resistance.name: Electrical Resistance
Electrical Resistance.description: Patrolians are notably capable of shrugging off electricity. You have resistance to lightning damage.

Saving Face.name: Saving Face
Saving Face.description: Trandoshans are careful not to show weakness in front of their allies, for fear of losing status. If you miss with an attack roll or fail an ability check or a saving throw, you can gain a bonus to the roll equal to the number of allies you can see within 30 feet of you (maximum bonus of +5). Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

Grovel, Cower, and Beg.name: Grovel, Cower, and Beg
Grovel, Cower, and Beg.description: As an action on your turn, you can cower pathetically to distract nearby foes. Until the end of your next turn, your allies gain advantage on attack rolls against enemies within 10 feet of you that can see you. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

Toughness.name: Toughness
Toughness.description: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 every time you gain a level.

Thick Skull.name: Thick Skull
Thick Skull.description: Your skull is a natural weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. Additionally, your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d6]] kinetic damage.

Weapon Training.name: Weapon Training
Weapon Training.description: You have proficiency in two vibroweapons or blasters of your choice.

Shrewd Demeanor.name: Shrewd Demeanor
Shrewd Demeanor.description: You have proficiency in two Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma skills of your choice.

Blindsight.name: Blindsight
Blindsight.description: Mikkian can perceive the world around them through heat and radiation. You have blindsight out to 30 feet. If another trait would grant you blindsight, the range is increased by half as many feet.

Fearsome Roar.name: Fearsome Roar
Fearsome Roar.description: Once per day, you can cast the fear force power. Charisma is your forcecasting ability for this power.

Two Livered.name: Two Livered
Two Livered.description: Zeltron have two livers, which makes them adept at filtering toxins. You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage (explained in chapter 9).

Proud Performer.name: Proud Performer
Proud Performer.description: Pa'lowick are best known for the energy they can bring to a singing performance. Whenever you make a Charisma (Performance) check involving singing, you are considered to have expertise in the Performance skill.

Undersized.name: Undersized
Undersized.description: Your small stature makes it hard for you to wield bigger weapons. You can—t use heavy shields. Additionally, you can—t use martial weapons with the two-handed property unless it also has the light property, and if a martial weapon has the versatile property, you can only wield it in two hands.

Tech Savant.name: Tech Savant
Tech Savant.description: You have proficiency in the Technology skill.

Second Heart.name: Second Heart
Second Heart.description: When you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead. You can't use this feature again until you finish a long rest.

Naturally Stealthy.name: Naturally Stealthy
Naturally Stealthy.description: You can attempt to hide even when you are obscured only by a creature that is your size or larger than you.

Call for Peace.name: Call for Peace
Call for Peace.description: As an action on your turn, you can emphatically demand that your foes embrace peace, thereby distracting them. Until the end of your next turn, enemies within 10 feet of you that can see you gain disadvantage on attack rolls against your allies. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

Galactic Scavengers.name: Galactic Scavengers
Galactic Scavengers.description: You have proficiency in mechanic's kits or scavenging kits (your choice).

Finance Savvy.name: Finance Savvy
Finance Savvy.description: Muun share a keen business sense and an ability to find value where others don't. Whenever you make a Charisma (Persuasion) check involving finances you are considered to have expertise in the Persuasion skill.

Shape Self.name: Shape Self
Shape Self.description: If you are not incapacitated, you can reshape your body to give yourself a head, one or two arms, one or two legs, and makeshift hands and feet, or you can revert to a limbless blob (no action required). As a bonus action, you can extrude a pseudopod that is up to 6 inches wide and 10 feet long or reabsorb it into your body. You can use this pseudopod to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour out the contents of a container. The pseudopod can—t attack, activate enhanced items, or carry more than 10 pounds.

Specialist.name: Specialist
Specialist.description: You have proficiency in one specialist's kit of your choice.

Climbing.name: Climbing
Climbing.description: You have a climbing speed of 30 feet.

Manual Laborer.name: Manual Laborer
Manual Laborer.description: You have proficiency in Athletics and one set of artisan's implements of your choice.

Eternal Nomads.name: Eternal Nomads
Eternal Nomads.description: You have proficiency in Lore or Survival (your choice).

Lava Dweller.name: Lava Dweller
Lava Dweller.description: Your body is well accustomed to extreme heat, giving you resistance to fire damage. Additionally, your thick hide is naturally adapted to hot climates, as described in chapter 5 of the Dungeon Master's Guide.

Ultraviolet Sight.name: Ultraviolet Sight
Ultraviolet Sight.description: Whenever you make a Wisdom (Perception) check related to sight, you are considered to have expertise in the Perception skill.

Diplomatic.name: Diplomatic
Diplomatic.description: You have proficiency with Insight or Persuasion (your choice).

Force Insensitive.name: Force Insensitive
Force Insensitive.description: While taung can be manipulated by the force, they cannot sense the Force. You can not use force powers or take levels in forcecasting classes.

Cultured.name: Cultured
Cultured.description: You have proficiency in the Lore skill.

Keen Hearing.name: Keen Hearing
Keen Hearing.description: You have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.

Adaptive Resilience.name: Adaptive Resilience
Adaptive Resilience.description: Prolongued use of technology allows rakata to readily adapt to its effects. You have advantage on Strength and Constitution saving throws against tech powers.

Tribal Warrior.name: Tribal Warrior
Tribal Warrior.description: You have proficiency with two vibroweapons of your choice.

Survivors of the Sands.name: Survivors of the Sands
Survivors of the Sands.description: You have proficiency in the Survival skill. Additionally, you don't treat desert terrain as difficult terrain. Lastly, you have advantage on Constitution saving throws made to avoid exhaustion due to extreme heat.

Performer.name: Performer
Performer.description: You have proficiency in the Performance skill.

Honed Mind.name: Honed Mind
Honed Mind.description: You have advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against force and tech powers.

Taung Weapon Training.name: Taung Weapon Training
Taung Weapon Training.description: You gain proficiency in one vibroweapon and one blaster of your choice.

Strong-Legged.name: Strong-Legged
Strong-Legged.description: When you make a long jump, you can cover a number of feet up to twice your Strength score. When you make a high jump, you can leap a number of feet up into the air equal to 3 + twice your Strength modifier.

Biological Specialists.name: Biological Specialists
Biological Specialists.description: You have proficiency with Medicine or Survival (your choice).

Slow and Lethargic.name: Slow and Lethargic
Slow and Lethargic.description: Hutts are slow and generally incapable of moving quickly. You have disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws, and when determining your bonus to AC from your Dexterity, you can't add more than +3.

Nimble Escape.name: Nimble Escape
Nimble Escape.description: You can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of your turns.

Snout.name: Snout
Snout.description: You have supreme control over your snout and can use it to manipulate objects as well as your hands. Additionally, your snout is a natural weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. Additionally, your unarmed strikes deal [[/r 1d4]] kinetic damage.

Thieves.name: Thieves
Thieves.description: You have proficiency in Sleight of Hand.

Courageous.name: Courageous
Courageous.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

Natural Empathy.name: Natural Empathy
Natural Empathy.description: Zeltron's limited telepathy allow them to sense mood shifts in those around them. You have advantage on Wisdom (Insight) checks to determine emotions against humanoids and beasts within 10 feet of you.

Powerful Build.name: Powerful Build
Powerful Build.description: Your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift doubles. If it would already double, it instead triples.

Fragile.name: Fragile
Fragile.description: Diathim are too weak to pack much of a punch. You have disadvantage on Strength saving throws, and when determining your bonus to attack and damage rolls for weapon attacks using Strength, you can—t add more than +3.

Mathematical Savants.name: Mathematical Savants
Mathematical Savants.description: Whenever you make an Intelligence (Technology) check involving mathematics, you are considered to have expertise in the Technology skill.

Musician.name: Musician
Musician.description: You are proficient in one musical instrument of your choice.

Long-Limbed.name: Long-Limbed
Long-Limbed.description: When you make a melee attack on your turn, your reach for it is 5 feet greater than normal.

Droid Systems.name: Droid Systems
Droid Systems.description: You do not need to eat, drink, or breathe. Additionally, you no longer require a tech focus to cast tech powers.

Ambusher.name: Ambusher
Ambusher.description: You have proficiency in the Stealth skill.

Pintsized.name: Pintsized
Pintsized.description: Your tiny stature makes it hard for you to wield bigger weapons. You can't use medium or heavy shields. Additionally, you can't wield weapons with the two-handed or versatile property, and you can only wield one-handed weapons in two hands unless they have the light property.

Expert Navigators.name: Expert Navigators
Expert Navigators.description: You are considered to have expertise in Wisdom (Survival) checks made to navigate.

Force Symbiosis.name: Force Symbiosis
Force Symbiosis.description: When you reach 3rd level, you can cast your choice of the curse, dun moch, or hex force power once per day. Your forcecasting ability is Charisma.

Infrared Sight.name: Infrared Sight
Infrared Sight.description: Whenever you make a Wisdom (Perception) check related to sight, you are considered to have expertise in the Perception skill.

Languages.name: Languages
Languages.description: You can speak, read, and write Galactic Basic and Zygerrian. Zygerrian is characterized by its subtle growls and purrs.

Martial Protocol.name: Martial Protocol
Martial Protocol.description: You have proficiency with light and medium armor as well as two simple or martial blasters or vibroweapons of your choice.

Travelers.name: Travelers
Travelers.description: You have proficiency in the Survival skill.

Tech Dabbler.name: Tech Dabbler
Tech Dabbler.description: You know the ward at-will tech power. When you reach 3rd level, you learn and can cast the analyze tech power once per day. When you reach 5th level, you can also cast the infiltrate tech power once per day. Intelligence is your techcasting ability for these powers. You do not require use of a wristpad for these powers.

Clever.name: Clever
Clever.description: You have proficiency in one Intelligence skill of your choice.

Hunters.name: Hunters
Hunters.description: Whenever you make a Wisdom (Survival) check to hunt for food, you are considered to have expertise in the Survival skill.

Natural Instinct.name: Natural Instinct
Natural Instinct.description: You have proficiency with Nature or Perception (your choice).
